store_info.name: Goodies Bake Shop
store_info.description: Sweet cupcakes and bakery treats for every celebration.

cupcakes.name: Pink Velvet Cupcake
cupcakes.description: A soft vanilla cupcake with blush buttercream and a tiny swirl of raspberry icing.

cupcakes.name: Pink Sugar Cookie
cupcakes.description: A soft pink sugar cookie with a buttery center and sparkling sugar on top.

cupcakes.name: Cherry Sprinkle Cupcake
cupcakes.description: Cherry cupcake with whipped frosting and a sweet sprinkle finish.

cupcakes.name: Cloud Cream Cupcake
cupcakes.description: A fluffy vanilla cupcake with smooth cream topping and pastel sugar.
